## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment
- ZeroPing version: [e.g. 1.2.0]
- PHP version: [e.g. 8.2]
- Database: [e.g. MySQL 8.0]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]

## Steps to reproduce
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened (include error messages and stack traces).

## Minimal reproduction
If possible, link a small repository or paste the relevant route/controller/model code.

## Additional context
Add any other context, screenshots, or logs here.
